[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100 2
1 0010000 1
2 0001010 2
3 0000001 1
4 1011010 4
5 0111100 4
6 1110111 6
7 0111011 5

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111111 a
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1110111 6 match 6
56 65 0111111 6
67 76 0111111 6
70 07 1011111 6

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 0111111 6
24 42 1110111 6 match 6
35 53 0111111 6
46 64 1111111 a
57 75 0110101 4
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 0111101 5

03 30 1111111 a
14 41 1111111 a
25 52 1110111 6 match 6
36 63 0111111 6
47 74 1100111 5
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0111110 5
72 27 1110111 6 match 6

04 40 1111111 a
15 51 0111101 5
26 62 1111111 a
37 73 0111111 6
